title: Smoky German Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole filled with smoky flavors and topped with a crispy cheese crust. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Cook the smoked sausage in a large skillet over medium-high heat, browning on all sides.
Add the caramelized onions and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the German-style potato salad and cook until heated through.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the shredded cheddar cheese and flour.
Sprinkle the cheese mixture evenly over the top of the casserole.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is golden brown and bubbly.
If using bacon bits, sprinkle on top of the casserole during the last 5 minutes of baking.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or chives if desired.
